info.name: AI Media Generate App API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the AI Media Generate backend.

**Auth models:**
- Mobile: `Authorization: Bearer {session_token}` from bootstrap
- Admin: `X-Admin-Key: {ADMIN_API_KEY}` header
- Internal: `X-Internal-Key: {INTERNAL_API_KEY}` header
- Webhook: `Authorization: Bearer {REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET}`

Run **Mobile > Auth > Bootstrap** first to auto-set the authToken.

item.name: Health
item.description: Public health and version endpoints. No authentication required.

item.name: Mobile
item.description: Mobile client endpoints. Most require Bearer token auth (obtained from Bootstrap).

item.name: Auth
item.description: Anonymous auth bootstrap, session info, and logout.

item.name: Home
item.description: Mobile home screen data — featured filters and category sections.

item.name: Categories
item.description: Browse categories and category-scoped filter listings.

item.name: Filters
item.description: Browse active filters. Responses are client-safe (no provider internals).

item.name: Uploads
item.description: Direct-to-R2 upload flow: request signed URL → PUT file → confirm.

request.description:
PUT the file binary to the signed R2 URL from the previous step.

Go to Body > Binary and select a local file. The URL is the presigned uploadUrl captured in {{uploadUrl}}.

This request goes directly to R2, not to the Worker.

item.name: Assets
item.description: List and view owned assets with signed read URLs.

item.name: Generations
item.description: Submit generation jobs and track their status.

item.name: Billing
item.description: Coin balance, subscriptions, products, and RevenueCat customer mapping.

item.name: Devices
item.description: Push notification token management (not yet implemented, returns 501).

item.name: Categories
item.description: Category CRUD and filter assignment management.

item.name: Filters
item.description: Filter CRUD, preview management, and category assignments.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Neon Glow Portrait",
  "slug": "neon-glow-portrait",
  "description": "Cyberpunk-inspired neon glow effect on portraits",
  "category": "portrait",
  "provider_name": "atlas",
  "model_key": "alibaba/wan-2.7/image-edit",
  "operation_type": "image_to_image",
  "prompt_template": "Transform the input photo into a neon-lit cyberpunk portrait with vivid glow effects, deep shadows, and saturated magenta and cyan highlights. Preserve the subject identity.",
  "default_params_json": { "size": "1024x1024", "n": 1 },
  "input_media_types": "image",
  "coin_cost": 8,
  "tag_id": null,
  "preview_image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550745165-9bc0b252726f?w=640&q=80",
  "is_featured": true,
  "featured_sort_order": 5,
  "is_active": true,
  "sort_order": 15
}

item.name: Billing
item.description: Billing product management, coin grants/debits, and event log.

item.name: Internal
item.description: Service-to-service routes. Requires X-Internal-Key header. Not for mobile clients.
